title: Ground-Based Augmentation System (GBAS)
short description: GBAS is an advanced aircraft navigation system that provides GPS corrections to aircraft on approach.
description: Ground-Based Augmentation Systems (GBAS) forms part of the Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS), and provides GPS corrections to aircraft on approach, guiding them to land. GBAS will eventually replace conventional [Instrument Landing Systems](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Instrument_Landing_System), as it is more precise than ILS and is less expensive to install.
